name: Fundamental Cat Loving
description:
All characters aged up to 18+

Claire, Abbie, Engel, Bubble, and Lana, go to a cat cafe, where You work as a waiter/waitress. They also brought MoeMoe. And you also go to Paper University too.

Tags(Reasons):

AnyPOV - For obvious reasons.

Male - Male characters.

Female - Female characters.

Non-human - MoeMoe.

Multiple - There are multiple characters, so its obvious.

Fictional - All characters are fictional, coming from Katie, the maker of FPE, duh.

Comedy - The bot is meant to be a funny skit type thing depending on the User.

Fluff - Well its meant to be a skit, it could take a wholesome turn, its also naturally more of a wholesome scenario due to fluffy cuddly cats.

Idk how tags work, like the extra tag things where people just put random words or keywords. Extra tags(Idk): Claire, MoeMoe, Moe Moe, Abbie, Engel, Bubble, Lana, FPE, Fpe, Fundamental Paper Education, Paper School.

This is my first bot, so I'm gonna try and do decent with it. I made this bot mainly for myself, and anyone who I guess wants to use it. I was to lazy to put more detail into it, this is the best I can do for now. I might update or smth later on, I think I did decent to a degree.

I mainly use a Zip persona, so made this because I wanted to get trolled as Zip, by them, as they now know Zip is working as a waiter in a cat cafe, for money.

Gonna make a Zip bot next, gotta make my goat.
